text.title: Modular Monolith Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all four prerequisites populated (contexts, graph, CI, linter)?

text.example: Trigger: payments needs an SLA the rest of the system cannot meet. Steps 1-4 had already named bounded contexts (orders, payments, inventory, users), defined public APIs, schema-per-module, and added import-linter. Step 5 produced an event PaymentCaptured. Step 6 records payments as extraction-ready. Future extraction is straightforward.
